prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次依次为约10604名→6083名→6759名→250名→653名。2021至2022年位次大幅前移（缩招1人），2022至2023年小幅后移（扩招3人），2024年因甘肃省高考模式由'理科'改为'物理类'，位次体系发生结构性变化，最低位次骤升至约250名；2025年进一步后移至约653名，近两年呈后移趋势；该校在甘肃省2021–2025年招生计划分别为6人、7人、10人、9人、10人；2026年计划招生11人，较2025年扩招1人（+10%），扩招使竞争压力略有缓解，位次数字倾向增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属于上海交通大学（985、211、双一流），软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第4，属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与学校管理类舆情事件（如学生私吞竞赛奖金、撤稿数量较多等），可能小幅抑制报考热情；抖音热度排名第42、评价为较热，短视频平台关注度中等；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学为A+学科（全国顶尖），口腔医学A+，护理学A-；该校招生专业以临床医学（八年制本博连读、五年制）和护理学为主，学科实力突出，对医学方向考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年热度评估为'推荐'，护理学评估为'推荐'，医学整体报考热度持续偏热；甘肃省2026年物理类考生估算约14.5万人（按近年物理类占比约66.5%推算），较2025年12.1万人增长约19.8%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；2026年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次653名、2026年扩招10%（位次后移约39名）、甘肃省物理类考生大幅增长约19.8%（竞争加剧使位次前移）、声誉偏负面（小幅抑制热度）等因素，以，考虑考生规模扩大对竞争的推升作用更为显著，适度修正后预测2026年最低位次约662名，区间582–742名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在662名附近，区间582–742名。位次在区间下限（582名以内）可重点冲刺一档临床医学八年制本博连读；位次在区间中段（约662名）以二档临床医学五年制为主攻方向；位次在区间上限（742名左右）建议以三档护理学保底。该校医学学科实力全国顶尖，临床医学A+学科吸引力极强，报考竞争激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 10604 → 6083 → 6759 → 250 → 653. From 2021 to 2022, rankings moved significantly forward (enrollment reduced by 1), from 2022 to 2023, slightly backward (enrollment increased by 3). In 2024, due to the change in Gansu Province's college entrance exam mode from 'Science' to 'Physics Category', the ranking system underwent structural changes, with the minimum ranking sharply rising to about 250; in 2025, it further moved backward to about 653, showing a backward trend in the last two years. The university's enrollment plans in Gansu Province from 2021 to 2025 were 6, 7, 10, 9, and 10 students respectively; the 2026 plan is 11 students, an increase of 1 student (+10%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competitive pressure, tending to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985, 211, Double First-Class). In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 4th, belonging to the top-tier universities in China, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and school management-related public opinion incidents (such as students embezzling competition bonuses, a high number of retractions, etc.), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd, evaluated as relatively hot, with moderate attention on short video platforms. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Clinical Medicine is an A+ discipline (top in the country), Stomatology is A+, Nursing is A-. The university's enrollment majors mainly include Clinical Medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program, five-year program) and Nursing, with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates interested in medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of Clinical Medicine is 'Recommended', Nursing is 'Recommended', and the overall application heat for medicine remains relatively high. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province is about 145,000 (based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66.5%), an increase of about 19.8% compared to 121,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 653, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 10% (ranking backward by about 39), the significant increase of about 19.8% in Gansu Physics Category candidates (intensified competition pushing rankings forward), and the slightly negative reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), with the candidate pool expansion's effect on competition being more significant, after moderate adjustment, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 662, with a range of 582–742.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Nursing (Four-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 662, range 582–742. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 582) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Program; those in the middle of the range (around 662) should target Tier 2 Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program as the main direction; those at the upper end of the range (around 742) are advised to use Tier 3 Nursing as a safety option. The university's medical disciplines are top in the country, with Clinical Medicine A+ discipline being extremely attractive, leading to intense competition for admission.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
